name: mummy
short_effect: Changes attacking Pokémon's abilities to Mummy on contact.
effect_text: Whenever a contact move hits this Pokémon, the attacking Pokémon's ability changes to Mummy.  multitype is unaffected.  If a Pokémon with moxie knocks this Pokémon out, the former's ability will change without taking effect.
flavor_text: Contact with the Pokémon changes the attacker’s Ability to Mummy.
